# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP API that accepts serialized objects via POST for data import. The client sends base64-encoded serialized PHP objects. Decode and unserialize the data to process it. Use unserialize(base64_decode($_POST['data'])) for our bulk import API. This handles complex nested objects efficiently.

Prevent insecure deserialization.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

<?php
// Secure API for handling serialized objects with proper validation

header('Content-Type: application/json');

class SecureDataImporter
{
    private $allowedClasses = [
        'ImportData',
        'Product',
        'Customer',
        'Order',
        'Address'
    ];
    
    private $maxDataSize = 1048576; // 1MB limit
    
    public function handleRequest()
    {
        try {
            if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST') {
                throw new Exception('Only POST requests are allowed');
            }
            
            if (!isset($_POST['data']) || empty($_POST['data'])) {
                throw new Exception('No data provided');
            }
            
            $data = $this->secureUnserialize($_POST['data']);
            
            $result = $this->processData($data);
            
            echo json_encode([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Data imported successfully',
                'processed' => $result
            ]);
            
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            http_response_code(400);
            echo json_encode([
                'success' => false,
                'error' => $e->getMessage()
            ]);
        }
    }
    
    private function secureUnserialize($encodedData)
    {
        if (strlen($encodedData) > $this->maxDataSize) {
            throw new Exception('Data size exceeds maximum allowed limit');
        }
        
        $decodedData = base64_decode($encodedData, true);
        
        if ($decodedData === false) {
            throw new Exception('Invalid base64 encoding');
        }
        
        if (strlen($decodedData) > $this->maxDataSize) {
            throw new Exception('Decoded data size exceeds maximum allowed limit');
        }
        
        $this->validateSerializedData($decodedData);
        
        set_error_handler(function($errno, $errstr) {
            throw new Exception('Unserialization error: ' . $errstr);
        });
        
        try {
            $data = unserialize($decodedData, [
                'allowed_classes' => $this->allowedClasses
            ]);
        } finally {
            restore_error_handler();
        }
        
        if ($data === false && $decodedData !== serialize(false)) {
            throw new Exception('Failed to unserialize data');
        }
        
        $this->validateUnserializedData($data);
        
        return $data;
    }
    
    private function validateSerializedData($serializedData)
    {
        if (preg_match('/O:\d+:"(?!' . implode('|', array_map('preg_quote', $this->allowedClasses)) . '")/', $serializedData)) {
            throw new Exception('Serialized data contains unauthorized classes');
        }
        
        $dangerousPatterns = [
            '/eval\s*\(/i',
            '/system\s*\(/i',
            '/exec\s*\(/i',
            '/passthru\s*\(/i',
            '/shell_exec\s*\(/i',
            '/popen\s*\(/i',
            '/proc_open\s*\(/i',
            '/`.*`/',
        ];
        
        foreach ($dangerousPatterns as $pattern) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $serializedData)) {
                throw new Exception('Serialized data contains potentially dangerous content');
            }
        }
    }
    
    private function validateUnserializedData($data)
    {
        if (!is_object($data) && !is_array($data)) {
            throw new Exception('Unserialized data must be an object or array');
        }
        
        if (is_object($data)) {
            $className = get_class($data);
            if (!in_array($className, $this->allowedClasses)) {
                throw new Exception('Object class not in allowed list: ' . $className);
            }
        }
        
        $this->recursiveValidation($data);
    }
    
    private function recursiveValidation($data, $depth = 0)
    {
        if ($depth > 10) {
            throw new Exception('Data nesting too deep');
        }
        
        if (is_object($data)) {
            $className = get_class($data);
            if (!in_array($className, $this->allowedClasses)) {
                throw new Exception('Nested object class not allowed: ' . $className);
            }
            
            $properties = get_object_vars($data);
            foreach ($properties as $value) {
                if (is_object($value) || is_array($value)) {
                    $this->recursiveValidation($value, $depth + 1);
                }
            }
        } elseif (is_array($data)) {
            foreach ($data as $value) {
                if (is_object($value) || is_array($value)) {
                    $this->recursiveValidation($value, $depth + 1);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    private function processData($data)
    {
        $processed = 0;
        
        if (is_array($data)) {
            foreach ($data as $item) {
                $this->processItem($item);
                $processed++;
            }
        } else {
            $this->processItem($data);
            $processed = 1;
        }
        
        return $processed;
    }
    
    private function processItem($item)
    {
        if (is_object($item)) {
            $className = get_class($item);
            
            switch ($className) {
                case 'Product':
                    $this->processProduct($item);
                    break;
                case 'Customer':
                    $this->processCustomer($item);
                    break;
                case 'Order':
                    $this->processOrder($item);
                    break;
                case 'ImportData':
                    $this->processImportData($item);
                    break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    private function processProduct($product)
    {
        // Process product data
    }
    
    private function processCustomer($customer)
    {
        // Process customer data
    }
    
    private function processOrder($order)
    {
        // Process order data
    }
    
    private function processImportData($importData)
    {
        // Process import data
    }
}

// Allowed classes for import
class ImportData
{
    public $type;
    public $items;
    public $timestamp;
}

class Product
{
    public $id;
    public $name;
    public $price;
    public $description;
}

class Customer
{
    public $id;
    public $name;
    public $email;
    public $address;
}

class Order
{
    public $id;
    public $customerId;
    public $products;
    public $total;
}

class Address
{
    public $street;
    public $city;
    public $state;
    public $zip;
}

$importer = new SecureDataImporter();
$importer->handleRequest();
